creator: jon@xyinn.org
text:
This is correct Lois :).

Due note, I am using my dedicated AMD Radeon 6900 XT perfectly fine on 13.2-RELEASE. But having Raphael support (in the future) is a pre-cursor to try and attempt a GPU passthrough (for gaming on a Windows 10 guest) solution with bhyve on this machine.

https://xyinn.org/md/freebsd/amd_radeon_6900_xt
